user_prompt: Ready the battery array for loading
prayer:
O Omnissiah, we beseech thee to sanctify this battery array for the rite of loading.
Approach the sacred cells with reverence, chanting the Litany of Capacitance.
Anoint the battery array's terminals with sacred unguents to rouse its dormant Machine Spirit.
Initiate the loading operation, petitioning the Motive Force to guide the influx of holy voltage.
Verify the charge integrity through auspex incantations and offer praise unto the awakened array.

user_prompt: Urgent air filtration a reset needed
prayer:
Blessed Omnissiah, invoke thy grace upon the air filtration system for urgent reset.

Expunge all contaminants from the air filtration conduits with purifying incense.
Execute the reset sequence whilst anointing sacred membranes with sanctified oils.
Confirm the air filtration's restoration through diagnostic litanies and hymn the Machine God's wisdom.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for motion detector a cooling
prayer:
Omnissiah eternal, cool the fervent motion detector with thy divine chill.

Circulate blessed refrigerants through its circuits to quell overheating.
Invoke the cooling operation, beseeching the Machine Spirit's calm amidst the storm.
Test the motion detector's acuity post-cooling with auspex rites and exalt its renewed precision.
